title: Tickeron's AI-Powered Double Agent Achieves 75% Win Rate in QQQ/QID Trading
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
**MUNICH** \- **May 6, 2025** \- [*PRLog*](https://www.prlog.org/) \-- **Innovative Trading Solution Unveiled**  
[Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), a leader in AI-driven financial solutions, proudly announces the success of its [Double Agent Trading Bot](https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/virtualagents/all/?utm_source=TickerOn&utm_campaign=TopMenu), achieving a remarkable 75% win rate in trading the Invesco [QQQ](https://tickeron.com/ticker/QQQ/) (QQQ) and ProShares UltraShort QQQ (QID). This advanced algorithm capitalizes on market trends, offering traders a dynamic, dual-strategy approach to maximize profitability.
